_meta.title: All-India Toll Plaza Database
_meta.data_source: NHAI Official / NHTIS / MoRTH FASTag Annual Pass List 2025
_meta.rate_basis: Car/Jeep/Van — FASTag single trip (rates revised annually ~Sep 1)
_meta.note: Verify latest rates at https://tis.nhai.gov.in before commercial use.

how_to_integrate.step_1: Normalize city names to lowercase using city_aliases{}
how_to_integrate.step_2: Look up route_index[from][to] → returns array of route_ids
how_to_integrate.step_3: Fetch route object from routes[] by route_id → has ordered toll_plaza_ids[]
how_to_integrate.step_4: Resolve each id from toll_plazas{} map for full plaza details

route_index._note: Keys are normalized city names (lowercase). Returns array of route_ids — first is recommended.
